Observability._comment: Switch the telemetry target for production by setting at most 3 env vars — no code, rebuild, or migration (FR-007/SC-004): OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT (vendor OTLP/HTTP URL), OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS (e.g. 'Authorization=Bearer <token>' — attached server-side only, never sent to the browser), and optionally OTEL_SERVICE_NAME. Unset => local .NET Aspire Dashboard. The browser always posts to /api/v1/telemetry; the proxy forwards to this destination with the vendor credential attached server-side. CaptureSqlText is intentionally omitted here so it defaults ON in Development and OFF elsewhere (FR-010); set Observability__CaptureSqlText to override.
